queries.question: Provide a list of all opinion pieces and also provide a list of all feature articles where they have 3 volumes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Opinion_Pieces.title
FROM Volumes JOIN Opinion_Pieces ON Volumes.volume_id = Opinion_Pieces.volume_id
UNION
SELECT Feature_Articles.title
FROM Volumes JOIN Feature_Articles ON Volumes.volume_id = Feature_Articles.volume_id
WHERE Volumes.number = "03"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?volumes a :Volumes .
    ?opinion_pieces a :Opinion_Pieces .
    ?opinion_pieces p:hasVolumes ?volumes .
    ?opinion_pieces p:title ?title .
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?volumes a :Volumes .
    ?feature_articles a :Feature_Articles .
    ?feature_articles p:hasVolumes ?volumes .
    ?feature_articles p:title ?title .
    ?volumes p:number ?number_f .
    FILTER((STR(?number_f) = "03" || STR(?number_f) = "3" || STR(?number_f) = "3.0"))
    BIND(?title AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Give me opinion pieces and feature articles where they have 3 volumes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Opinion_Pieces.title
FROM Volumes JOIN Opinion_Pieces ON Volumes.volume_id = Opinion_Pieces.volume_id
WHERE Volumes.number = "03"
UNION
SELECT Feature_Articles.title
FROM Volumes JOIN Feature_Articles ON Volumes.volume_id = Feature_Articles.volume_id
WHERE Volumes.number = "03"
